liquidity_cap: requires ADV/participation analysis before sizing; source-report turnover and Yahoo volume are included as preliminary liquidity context
hedge_posture: no hedge recommended at screen stage; use size-down/no-position until valuation and trigger evidence improve
add_rule: add only after source-backed valuation, fundamentals, and technical confirmation are all upgraded
trim_rule: trim or keep at zero if price extends without volume/valuation support or DCF remains not-decision-ready
exit_rule: remove from active candidate list if technical trigger fails or missing valuation evidence cannot be resolved
max_loss_posture: no model capital at risk before decision-ready valuation; conditional risk budget follows StockLoop batch defaults
monitoring_cadence: daily price/volume review until trigger resolves; refresh valuation evidence before any model allocation
